_comment: Overload (OL) gear ROLL PROBABILITY model — the acquisition-cost side of OL, complementing the DPS-value side (src/olcalc.ts, src/olconfigs.ts, src/bestol.ts). DATAMINED tier; cross-confirmed by two independent research passes (nikke.gg, prydwen.gg, gamevika, JP volx.jp/game8, KR arca.live), 2026-07-15. Line VALUES live in data/ol-tiers.json (confirmed exact). Keys match data/ol-lines.json.

typeWeights._comment: Relative weight of each stat TYPE when a line's stat is drawn. Sums to 100. Draw is WITHOUT replacement — a piece cannot hold the same stat twice.

lineCountGates._comment: Probability each of the 3 positional line-slots is present on a roll. Slot 1 always; slot 2 50%; slot 3 30%. All three present = 1*0.5*0.3 = 15%.

tierBands._comment: When a line rolls, its value TIER (1..15) is drawn from these bands (front-loaded — low tiers common). Within-band per-tier split is NOT datamined; the sim assumes UNIFORM within a band (flagged assumption, not measured).

_firstOverloadNote: The FIRST time a piece is overloaded, every line it produces is guaranteed tier 11 (bottom of the top band). Applies to initial creation only, NOT rerolls.

cost._comment: Reroll/lock economics. Owner-confirmed 2026-07-15. Both lock modes share the per-roll reroll module cost; they differ only in how holding a lock is paid. See src/overload/model.ts.
cost._rerollNote: Modules per reroll, indexed by number of lines locked that roll: 0->1, 1->2, 2->3. Same in both modes.
cost._permNote: ONE-TIME module cost to reach N permanent locks, indexed by lock number: reaching 1 lock costs +2, reaching 2 locks costs +3. Paid once; lock persists.
cost._tempNote: Temp-lock currency spent PER ROLL to hold N lines, indexed by locks held: 1 held -> 20/roll, 2 held -> 30/roll. Paid every roll (temp locks expire). Reroll module cost still applies on top.
